case_title: GLORIA LOPEZ VS. SONDRA ANGULO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ANGULO, SONDRA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANGULO, SONDRA LADIA, LIAN
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ANGULO, SONDRA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION, U.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT ANGULO, SONDRA BALDERAMA, RUDY ASSIGNED TO REPRESENT PARTY FOR U. D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

JURY TRIAL ASSIGNED ON AUG-15-2005 TO DEPT. 505. SETTLEMENT IS REACHED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES AT 1041 ALABAMA ST. SF., CA 94110. THE CAUSE IS STAYED THROUGH SEPTEMBER 30, 2005. DEFENDANT IS TO MAKE PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF IN C/O MS. KEITH IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,850, RENT AND $125, UTILITY BY AUGUST 17, 2005, 5 PM. DEFENDANT IS ALSO TO MAKE PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF IN C/O MS. KEITH IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,850, RENT AND $125, UTILITY BY SEPTEMBER 1, 2005, 5 PM. PLAINTIFF WAIVES $659 BACK RENT. DEFENDANT IS TO VACATE THE PREMISES BY SEPTEMBER 30, 2005. IF THE TERMS ARE COMPLIED WITH, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS, PLAINTIFF WILL SEEK ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WITH 24-HOUR NOTICE. THE LEASE IS FORFEITED. NO FURTHER STAY WILL BE GRANTED. THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO MUTUAL GENERAL RELEASE FOR ANY CLAIM. PROOVE-UP HEARING AS TO DEFENDANT LIAN LADIA IS ALSO HELD. THE COURT ORDERS ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED WITH POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES, 1041 ALABAMA ST., SF., CA 94110 AND THE AMOUNT OF $1,584.05, WHICH IS A TOTAL OF BACK RENT OF $659 AND 15 DAY'S RENT. EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED. JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER;REPORTER CANDACE YOUNT;CLERK T.MARUYAMA (505)
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATAICE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE FILED BY LOPEZ, GLORIA ANGULO, SONDRA
